_meta.keyKnowledge: We plan and create artworks using visual conventions, processes and materials to communicate ideas, perspectives and meaning.

_source.w: We plan and create artworks using visual conventions, processes and materials to communicate ideas, perspectives and meaning.
y: Planning our art helps us create works that effectively communicate our intended message.
Understanding visual conventions gives us a shared language for expressing ideas visually.
Working through a deliberate creative process develops our artistic thinking.
eg: We apply our understanding of processes and materials to demonstrate aesthetic qualities.
We use joining techniques to create a 3D construction that communicates an idea.
We plan our artwork through sketches and experiments before creating the final piece.
We create artwork that responds to a social or environmental issue we care about.
We select and combine materials deliberately to achieve a specific effect.
We use colour theory, composition and perspective purposefully in our work.
